_comment: Runtime-configurable projection rules. Each view controls include/exclude/redact fields applied to every candidate profile. Loaded dynamically at request time — no server restart required.

full._description: Full access — all fields returned. Used by internal admins and system integrations.

recruiter._description: Recruiter view — PII (email, phone) is redacted. Skills, experience, education and timeline are included.

public._description: Public view — PII and provenance metadata are excluded. Suitable for candidate-facing portals.

anonymous._description: Anonymous view — full_name is redacted and all PII is stripped. Used for blind screening to remove hiring bias.

skills_only._description: Skills-only view — returns just the candidate name, skills list, and confidence score.
